sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42865" key="e)rwtomani/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτο-μᾰνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,=<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρωμανία,</foreign> <sense id="n42865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">raving love,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.451f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
